name: Fox Hills Golf Performance Center
about: Fox Hills Golf Performance Center is an indoor golf simulator venue located in Plymouth, Michigan. It is equipped with eight cutting-edge Trackman simulators, offering players the ability to play over 260 virtual courses, receive detailed swing analysis, and engage in interactive games. The venue operates on a per-bay-hour pricing model and features a full-service bar, making it a social destination as well as a serious practice facility. The Performance Center is open year-round, providing a weather-proof golfing experience with professional instruction available for players of all skill levels, from beginners to seasoned golfers.
why_golfers_like_it: Industry-leading Trackman technology for precise swing analysis and realistic course play
Full-service bar offering craft beers, fine wines, and signature cocktails to enhance the social experience
Versatile environment suitable for both focused practice and fun group events like parties and corporate outings

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service food available; a public grill menu is referenced on-site.
Full-service bar offering premium beverages, including craft beers, fine wines, signature cocktails, and non-alcoholic options.

simulator_hardware.notes: 8 cutting-edge simulators featuring advanced radar and camera tracking.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state whether club rentals are available, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs or inquire directly with the venue.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: The venue offers a full-service bar and food options. The website does not mention a policy regarding bringing outside food or drink, so it is best to confirm their policy beforehand.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round typically take on the simulator?
faq.answer: While the website does not provide a specific time for an 18-hole simulator round, a typical session can vary, usually taking between 2-3 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly. It offers junior programs and camps for children as young as four, and its various amenities and games make it suitable for families.
